# MYP Learning Maps

> Interactive learning maps and progression visualisers for all IB Middle Years Programme (MYP) subjects.

This is an independent teacher-developed tool that summarises and visualises MYP subject guides, including objectives, criteria, concepts and progression from Year 1 to Year 5.

The site is a single-page application with tabs for each subject.

## Subjects included
- Design
- Arts
- Sciences
- Physical and Health Education
- Language Acquisition
- Language and Literature
- Individuals and Societies
- Mathematics

Each subject includes:
- Overview of the subject and inquiry model
- Key and related concepts
- Criterion-based learning map (A–D)
- Strand-level progression (Year 1, Year 3, Year 5)
- Achievement level descriptors (1–8)
- Summary progression tables

## Notes
- This is an independent teacher-developed resource.
- The International Baccalaureate (IB) is the authoritative source for official MYP subject guides.
- Content is designed to simplify and visualise curriculum structure for teaching and planning.

## Access
- Main site: https://edu-matthew-pham.github.io/myp-learnings-maps/
